name: M.ImputedValue_Median
label: Median Imputation
description: Computes the median of all non-missing observed values within a group as the imputed value. More robust to outliers than mean imputation.

formula.notes: Same partitioning logic as mean imputation. Preferred when the distribution is skewed or when outliers may distort the mean.

methodInput.name: value
methodInput.description: Source values from which the median is computed

methodInput.name: group_partition
methodInput.description: Grouping variables defining the median computation scope

assumptions: At least one non-missing value exists in the group
Missing data are MCAR or MAR
Median imputation underestimates variance — not suitable when distributional shape must be preserved
